description.content:
DefiLlama is the largest open-source DeFi TVL and yield aggregator. The public REST API at api.llama.fi exposes TVL, prices, stablecoins, yields, DEX/options volumes, fees, and revenue datasets without authentication. The Pro API at pro-api.llama.fi provides higher rate limits and additional endpoints under a paid plan.

Contact Support:
 Name: DefiLlama
